name: vscodium-recent-projects
title: VSCodium
description: Control VSCodium directly from Raycast. Search and open recent projects, manage extensions, and launch new windows.
author: degouville

commands.name: index
commands.title: Search Recent Projects
commands.subtitle: VSCodium
commands.description: Search and open recent projects from VSCodium.

commands.name: open-with-vscodium
commands.title: Open with VSCodium
commands.subtitle: VSCodium
commands.description: Open the selected Finder item with VSCodium.

commands.name: install-extension
commands.title: Install Extension
commands.description: Install extensions from Open VSX into VSCodium

preferences.name: layout
preferences.title: View Layout
preferences.description: Select the layout of the view

preferences.name: keepSectionOrder
preferences.title: Advanced
preferences.label: Keep Section Order
preferences.description: Keep the order of the sections while searching folders, files, etc.

preferences.name: closeOtherWindows
preferences.title: Usability
preferences.label: Close Other VSCodium Windows
preferences.description: Close other VSCodium windows when opening a project

preferences.name: terminalApp
preferences.title: Terminal App
preferences.description: Select which Terminal App to use when opening with a terminal

preferences.name: showGitBranch
preferences.title: Git Integration
preferences.label: Show Git Branch
preferences.description: Display the current Git branch for files and folders in Git repositories

preferences.name: gitBranchColor
preferences.title: Git Integration Color
preferences.label: Git Branch Color
preferences.description: Hexadecimal color code for Git branch tag (e.g., #00FF00). Leave empty to use default green
